sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98422" key="summhri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμμηρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n98422.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">meeting of the thighs</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:103" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.103</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
